result.stdout:
Description:
  Refreshes `.upmconfig.toml` with a new token from Google Cloud.

Usage:
  GCPRefreshUpmToken [options]

Options:
  -r, --registry <registry>  URL of the Google Cloud Artifact Registry
  -c, --config <config>      config file
  --version                  Show version information
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Refreshes `.upmconfig.toml` with a new token from Google Cloud.

Usage:
  GCPRefreshUpmToken [options]

Options:

  -c, --config <config>      config file
  --version                  Show version information
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
